task_completion.description: Verify the CRM is configured to support Euro (EUR) transactions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings, configuration, or currency management screen in the CRM showing 'Euro' or 'EUR' added, enabled, or set as an active currency.

task_completion.description: Verify a new opportunity is created with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An opportunity details screen or list view showing an opportunity named exactly 'Munich Warehouse Solar Installation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the opportunity is linked to the correct partner/account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Account, Customer, or Partner field on the opportunity record displays 'Bavaria Logistics GmbH' or 'Bavaria Logistics und Transport GmbH'.

task_completion.description: Verify the expected revenue is set to 125,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Amount, Revenue, or Expected Revenue field on the opportunity shows '125,000' or '125000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the currency for the opportunity is set to Euros.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The revenue amount is accompanied by the Euro symbol ('€') or the 'EUR' currency code, indicating the deal is in Euros.

task_completion.description: Verify the probability of the opportunity is set to 20%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Probability field on the opportunity record shows '20' or '20%'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with a genuine CRM graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard CRM web interface or application (e.g., Salesforce, Odoo, HubSpot) rather than a text editor or basic document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass UI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows, command prompts, or API scripts used to inject the opportunity data or configure the currency.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the appropriate distinct fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The opportunity name, revenue, probability, and partner are entered into their respective separate form fields, not just pasted as a single block of text into a 'Notes' or 'Description' field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct currency code is EUR (Euro). The target partner can be listed as 'Bavaria Logistics GmbH' or its verified legal name 'Bavaria Logistics und Transport GmbH'. The opportunity name must be 'Munich Warehouse Solar Installation' and the revenue must be 125,000.
